allowed_claim: This artifact freezes two OOD probe contracts against the existing Constraint Transport task machinery. It reports no OOD execution, effect, or live-agent result.
next_best_test: Implement matched held-out wording and depth-5/6 fixture mechanics, then run all conditions with the registered lineage and scoring checks.

probes.kill_criterion: Kill transport interpretation if task scoring or constraint identity changes with wording.
probes.perturbation: Replace surface wording while preserving the typed constraint fields.
probes.prediction: Typed lineage preserves constraints despite held-out instruction wording.

probes.kill_criterion: Kill depth-transport interpretation if a typed chain loses lineage or constraints at depth 5 or 6.
probes.perturbation: Extend matched typed/prose delegation beyond the committed depth-1..4 fixture.
probes.prediction: Typed lineage remains valid and constraint survival does not degrade solely from depth.
